functions: Forkhead box transcription factor that shapes chromatin accessibility at senescence-specific enhancers
Stimulates H3K27 acetylation and chromatin opening at de novo enhancers of pro-inflammatory SASP genes
Coordinates the pro-inflammatory SASP program
Mesenchymal transcription factor driving epithelial-mesenchymal transition signatures
Promotes myeloid differentiation while suppressing T-cell differentiation in CD34+ progenitor cells
Lung endothelial-specific transcription factor regulating S1PR1 expression, angiogenesis and vascular development
Transcriptional activator of EZH2 mediating epigenetic silencing of DKK3 via H3K27me3
Upregulates antioxidant proteins FDX1 and HO-1 to reduce labile iron pool and ROS

disease_associations.disease: B-cell acute lymphoblastic leukemia (FOXF1/FENDRR subtype with IGH::FENDRR rearrangement)
T-cell acute lymphoblastic leukemia / mixed phenotype acute leukemia (t(14;16) BCL11B enhancer hijacking)

pubmed.druggability_notes: FOXF1-mediated enhancer remodeling is proposed as a key target for modulating senescent cells to promote healthy aging. FOXF1 is highlighted as a potential therapeutic target in renal fibrosis (FOXF1-EZH2-DKK3 axis), pulmonary fibrosis (iron/ROS-FOXF1 feedback loop), and as a subtype-defining marker in B-ALL/T-ALL where early immunotherapy (blinatumomab) or targeted interventions may benefit patients. Identified as a potential biomarker/therapeutic target in osteosarcoma. No specific binding pocket or small-molecule drug class described.

functions: DNA-binding transcription activator (RNA polymerase II-specific)
Probable transcription activator for lung-specific genes
Sequence-specific binding to RNA Pol II cis-regulatory regions
Positive regulation of transcription by RNA polymerase II
Regulates lung development and lung vasculature development
Involved in blood vessel and venous blood vessel development
Drives heart development (cardiac left ventricle morphogenesis, endocardial cushion, ductus arteriosus closure)
Regulates digestive tract, pancreas, trachea, and ureter development

disease_associations.disease: Disease-associated variants (FOXF1 disease variant; e.g., alveolar capillary dysplasia with misalignment of pulmonary veins)

functions: Transcription activator for lung-specific genes
Forkhead box transcription factor
Regulates lateral plate mesoderm formation
Regulates CDH11 gene transcription

disease_associations.disease: Alveolar capillary dysplasia with misalignment of pulmonary veins
